calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. GILLIAN # 12355.

Petitioner FATIMA AMIRA ROOF was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The petitioner did not have proof of San Francisco residency, and stated that she lives in Hayward, CA but had identification that indicated that she lives in Mt. Eden, CA. On the Court's own discretion, The Court grants the petition to change name of petitioner.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to NINA LAWANDA CHRISTIAN.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
